name: @mdwrk/structured-data
description: Reusable Schema.org and JSON-LD builders for MdWrk apps, packages, public content, and discovery surfaces.

scripts.test:schema-conformance: npm run build && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-content-contract && node --test tests/schema-contract-t0.test.mjs tests/schema-contract-t1.test.mjs tests/schema-contract-t2.test.mjs tests/generated-page-family-builders-t0.test.mjs tests/generated-page-family-builders-t1.test.mjs tests/generated-page-family-builders-t2.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-content-contract && node --test tests/pure-builder-t0.test.mjs tests/pure-builder-t1.test.mjs tests/pure-builder-t2.test.mjs tests/schema-contract-t0.test.mjs tests/schema-contract-t1.test.mjs tests/schema-contract-t2.test.mjs tests/generated-page-family-builders-t0.test.mjs tests/generated-page-family-builders-t1.test.mjs tests/generated-page-family-builders-t2.test.mjs && node tests/run-smoke.mjs

author: Jacob Stewart <jacob@swarmauri.com>
